title: Bridge Essay: Studying insight problem solving with neuroscientific methods.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Knowledge/Gnosis** (Phase 14) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Knowledge/Gnosis to mechanistic neuroscience through Studying, insight, problem, solving, with.

**Studying insight problem solving with neuroscientific methods.** — Methods. PMID: 17434418. DOI: 10.1016/j.ymeth.2006.12.005. Insights are sporadic, unpredictable, short-lived moments of exceptional thinking where unwarranted assumptions need to be discarded before solutions to problems can be obtained. Insight requires arestructuring of the problem situation that is relatively rare and hard to elicit in the laboratory. One way of dealing with this problem is to catalyze such restructuring processes using solution hints.
